from settlement_runner import next_scheduled_run


def test_utc_month_boundary_can_still_reach_local_leap_day_cutoff():
    result = next_scheduled_run(
        "2024-03-01T00:30:00+00:00",
        billing_day=31,
        hour=17,
        minute=0,
        timezone_name="America/Los_Angeles",
    )

    assert result == "2024-02-29T17:00:00-08:00"
